scenarios.name: auth-service HTTP 5xx error rate spiked
scenarios.description: Error rate and latency on auth-service /api/v1/auth/validate spiked during a load surge. Threads are blocking on database connection acquisition and requests are timing out (DatabaseTimeoutException), exhausting the connection pool.

initial_context.suspected_technical_cause: Injected DB connection-pool timeout fault in AuthValidationService: a CPU burn + 5s Thread.sleep on the request path under chaos mode, throwing DatabaseTimeoutException and exhausting the pool.
symptoms: DatabaseTimeoutException: Timed out waiting for connection from pool
